scope.condition: The high-severity path is limited to the Vite development server on Windows alternate paths. Takos production ships static documentation output and never runs or publishes the VitePress development server.
scope.removeWhen: Remove this waiver as soon as a stable VitePress release accepts a Vite version newer than 6.4.2. VitePress 2 prereleases are not a GA dependency.

advisories.title: esbuild enables any website to send any requests to the development server and read the response
Vite Vulnerable to Path Traversal in Optimized Deps `.map` Handling
launch-editor: NTLMv2 hash disclosure via UNC path handling on Windows
vite: `server.fs.deny` bypass on Windows alternate paths
